name: Virtual Shopping Town
description: A virtual spatial shopping application featuring a large multiplayer city environment, real-time social networking, and integrated e-commerce.
highlights: Delivered a 3D multi-user shopping experience featuring interactive products, live carts, and checkout systems.
Architected and developed real-time multiplayer synchronization using Photon.
Integrated with custom backend APIs via a REST client to synchronize player accounts, catalog details, and checkout actions.
